title: always_comb unique else if with --assert will cause linter error

features.name: unique if in always_comb block
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a unique if statement that checks a condition and assigns to a variable

features.name: else if chain in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with an else if chain following a unique if statement

features.name: unique if else if with assert flag
features.description: Code should include a unique if with else if chain in always_comb that is processed with --assert flag
